content.speakerText: Let's stay in touch — maybe grab coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们保持联系吧？下周一起喝杯咖啡？

options.text: Sure, I'll send you a LinkedIn request.
Yeah, maybe we can talk sometime.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体行动（发送领英请求），符合场景中‘用具体行动增强可信度’的要求。选项2太模糊，缺乏行动承诺；选项3否定联系，不符合语境；选项4时间不明确且未使用常见社交工具，可信度低。

content.speakerText: It was great meeting you at the conference. Let’s keep in touch!
content.speakerTextCn: 在会议上见到你真好，我们保持联系吧！

options.text: Absolutely! I'll add you on WhatsApp.
I guess so, if you want.
I'm too busy for social media.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体的联系方式（WhatsApp），体现主动性与可信度。选项2态度消极，缺乏热情；选项3和4直接拒绝或推迟联系，违背场景目标。

content.speakerText: I really enjoyed our conversation. How can I reach you?
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受我们的对话，我该怎么联系你？

options.text: Here's my business card — email or LinkedIn works best.
You can try calling my office.
I don't really use any contact apps.
Just send me a message on Instagram.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了专业且常见的联系方式（邮箱和领英），符合职场场景。选项2仅提供办公室电话，不够现代和便捷；选项3拒绝联系，不合语境；选项4使用Instagram，虽可联系但不够专业，不适合正式后续跟进。

content.template: Let's stay in touch — I'll send you a ___ invite.
content.hint: 职场中常用的正式社交平台
content.knowledgePoint: 职场场景高频词汇（社交平台）

content.template: I'd love to ___ in touch — my email is on my card.
content.hint: 固定搭配：keep in touch（保持联系）

content.template: We should ___ coffee next week — let me know what time works for you.
content.hint: 口语中表示‘喝杯咖啡’的常用动词

content.speakerText: Let's stay in touch — maybe grab coffee next week?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们保持联系吧？下周一起喝杯咖啡？
expectedAnswers: That sounds great! I'll send you a LinkedIn invite.
Definitely! You can find me on LinkedIn or email me at john@example.com.
Cool! I'll add you on WhatsApp — my number is 555-1234.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并承诺后续联系
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常表达习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了‘stay in touch’‘send invite’‘LinkedIn/email/WhatsApp’等关键词

content.speakerText: It was great meeting you. How can we stay connected?
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴认识你，我们怎么保持联系？
expectedAnswers: I’d love to! Here’s my card — email or LinkedIn is best.
Absolutely! I’ll send you a connection request on LinkedIn right away.
Let’s exchange contacts — I’m on Slack too if you prefer that.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动提供联系方式并表达持续联系意愿
语言准确性：使用正确介词、动词搭配和专业术语
表达自然度：语气友好、不生硬，符合职场社交语境
关键词覆盖：使用了‘stay connected’‘LinkedIn’‘email’‘exchange contacts’等关键词

content.speakerText: I really enjoyed our chat. Let’s not lose touch!
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受我们的聊天，别失联了！
expectedAnswers: Same here! I’ll follow you on LinkedIn — you can find me under [Your Name].
Definitely! I’ll shoot you an email this week with my details.
Totally! Let’s set a reminder to connect again in a month.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并提出具体跟进方式
语言准确性：动词使用恰当（follow, shoot an email, set a reminder）
表达自然度：语气热情、口语化但不随意，符合非正式职场场景
关键词覆盖：使用了‘lose touch’‘LinkedIn’‘email’‘connect’等关键词
